title: , Princess of Kyiv, named Helen at Holy Baptism
name: Olha
troparia: (Tone 1) On the wings of the knowledge of God* you lifted your mind, O glorious Olha* and soared beyond the visible* attaining to God, the Creator of all.* You found Him and in baptism received the new life* abiding forever in incorruption* and enjoying the fruits of the life-giving Tree.
kontakia: (Tone 4) Today let us praise God*cWho gives blessings to all,* for in Rus-Ukraine he glorified* Olha the divinely wise.* Let us ask Him to grant our souls* pardon of sins through her prayers.
